creator: theron.tarigo@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #0)
Does this error occur with port x11/nvidia-driver-390 ?  The nvidia ports contain workarounds for CURRENT and STABLE changes, since their maintainers move faster than Nvidia at these fixes.
If you see the error with the port, it should be assigned to that port.  Regardless, this is not a base system kernel bug.
